news.title: Why is Rackspace Technology stock surging today?
news.snippet: Investing.com -- Rackspace Technology stock surged nearly 18.9% in mid-day trading today, staging a sharp recovery after collapsing more than 20% in the...

news.title: ReVia Named First Runner-Up at LegalTechTalk London LaunchPad Competition
news.snippet: The recognition, awarded during the conference held June 17–18 in London, recognizes ReVia as one of the event's top emerging legal technology companies.
